issues: Player name is misspelled: the draft says 'Tony Bobbin' but the OCR reads 'Tony Bobbitt' (listed on roster as Tony Bobbitt).
The draft's description of the collision is slightly off: the OCR says Bobbitt 'braces himself after losing collision' with Schuler, not simply 'collides with'.

The headline in the draft ('CRAIG HODGE HEADING FOR a crash landing') is actually a caption/headline for the photo, not the main article headline. The main article is about the Fredericton Express (AHL), not the Sockeyes. The Sockeyes content is a photo caption.
The byline 'Mike Beamish' belongs to the adjacent Fredericton Express article, not to the Sockeyes photo caption.
review.correctedDescriptionShort: Photo caption: Richmond Sockeyes' Tony Bobbitt (18) braces after a collision with Kelowna defenceman Allan Schuler (4) in a B.C. Junior League playoff game; Richmond won 5-4 in overtime.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: A photo published in The Vancouver Sun shows Richmond Sockeyes forward Tony Bobbitt (#18) bracing himself after losing a collision with Kelowna defenceman Allan Schuler (#4) during a B.C. Junior League playoff game on Wednesday, March 18, 1987. The caption notes that Richmond won the game 5-4 in overtime, with the full story referenced on page D2. The image appears alongside an unrelated article by Mike Beamish about the Fredericton Express (AHL).
review.correctedHeadline: CRAIG HODGE HEADING FOR a crash landing
review.notes: The Sockeyes content on this page is a standalone photo caption, not a full article. The headline is a photo caption label, not an article headline. The byline (Mike Beamish) belongs to the adjacent Fredericton Express column and should not be attributed to the Sockeyes caption. Player name corrected from 'Bobbin' to 'Bobbitt'.
